expected_failures.notes: Generated stress pair includes big-mining-drill, which declares incompatibility with Space Age and AAI Industry.
Generated stress cluster produces an external circular dependency before MIR data changes run.
Generated stress pair includes bobassembly, whose tested local zip requires Space Age 3.0.0.
Generated stress pair hits an external bobmodules prototype error before MIR data changes run.
Generated stress pair hits an external bzsilicon/AAI recipe prototype using obsolete Factorio fields.
Generated stress pair creates an external technology prerequisite cycle before MIR data changes run.
Curated stress scenario includes xander-mod-shemp, which declares incompatibility with Space Age.
External mod has an undeclared stack inserter requirement and crashes when none is present.
External mod uses obsolete Factorio recipe prototype fields in its tested local zip.
Reviewed Factorio 2.0 local zip sweep dependency closure was incomplete or had no compatible local release; not a MIR regression.
Reviewed Factorio 2.0 local zip library under Factorio 2.1: these archived local zips advertise no 2.1-compatible release; updated 2.1-compatible zips remain covered by the normal 2.1 smoke set.
Reviewed Factorio 2.0 local zip sweep load failure reproduced without MIR in artifacts/backport-2-3-0-upstream-load-isolation-runner.
Reviewed Factorio 2.0 local zip sweep: active nauv-so labs accept only Space Age or mod-specific packs for these streams, so MIR skips instead of generating unresearchable research.
